project.summary: Core platform migration is on track; 4 of 7 milestones completed with the remaining 3 on schedule for Q2.

milestones.title: Architecture Design Complete
milestones.description: Architecture review board sign-off on modernization plan

milestones.title: Core API Migration
milestones.description: Migrate all core REST APIs to new platform

milestones.title: Data Layer Modernization
milestones.description: Switch primary data storage to new architecture

milestones.title: Auth & Identity Integration
milestones.description: Deploy new SSO and identity management system

milestones.title: Frontend Component Library
milestones.description: Build and ship shared UI component library

milestones.title: Performance & Load Testing
milestones.description: Comprehensive load testing targeting 10k concurrent users

milestones.title: Production Rollout
milestones.description: General availability release to all customers

workItems.title: REST API v2 Endpoint Migration
workItems.description: Migrated all 47 REST endpoints from legacy .NET Framework to .NET 8 minimal APIs with full backward compatibility.

workItems.title: Database Schema Upgrade to v3
workItems.description: Completed schema migration for PostgreSQL including zero-downtime migration scripts and rollback procedures.

workItems.title: OAuth 2.0 / OIDC Provider Swap
workItems.description: Replaced legacy SAML provider with modern OAuth 2.0 + OIDC flow supporting SSO across three identity providers.

workItems.title: CI/CD Pipeline Overhaul
workItems.description: Rebuilt build and deployment pipelines with GitHub Actions, achieving 12-minute end-to-end deploy cycles.

workItems.title: Telemetry & Observability Stack
workItems.description: Deployed OpenTelemetry collectors with Grafana dashboards for latency, error rate, and throughput monitoring.

workItems.title: Shared Component Library (React)
workItems.description: Building reusable UI component library with accessibility compliance; 18 of 25 components completed.

workItems.title: Load Test Harness Setup
workItems.description: Configuring k6 load test suites targeting 10k concurrent users; environment provisioning 80% complete.

workItems.title: API Rate Limiting & Throttling
workItems.description: Implementing sliding-window rate limiter with Redis backing store; unit tests passing, integration tests in progress.

workItems.title: Legacy Report Engine Decommission
workItems.description: Delayed due to unexpected downstream dependencies in finance module; new target date set for Q2.

workItems.title: Mobile Responsive Layouts
workItems.description: Carried over from Q4 2025; blocked on finalization of the component library before responsive breakpoints can be applied.
workItems.notes: Deferred from Q4 2025 due to component library dependency

workItems.title: Third-Party Webhook Integration
workItems.description: Deprioritized in favor of core API migration; will resume once load testing milestone is reached.
